hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q 'run\.lock' && grep -q 'rm' && echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: Never delete run.lock"}' || true

hooks.prompt: STOP. Re-read CLAUDE.md and the user's most recent prompt. Did you do ALL the work asked, or did you summarize/journal/skip the hard parts? Every verdict, every finding, every requested change must be integrated into /src, not just documented. If you skipped anything, go back and do it now.
